title: Dynamic Hud
description: Makes the HUD dynamic. Only showing elements such as the crosshair and the health when needed
body:
# Dynamic Hud Dynamic Hud is a mod that hides elements of the hud when they are not needed to reduce screen bloating and OLED burn-in. Every modern games does the same, it hides you're health bar when it's full and there are no ennemies etc... ## 🔎 Features - **Fully dynamic:** Every part of vanilla Minecraft's in-game hud is now dynamic. - **Customisation:** Every hud element is toggleable, you can keep them vanilla, make them dynamic or fully hide them as well as choose what should trigger them. - **Context-based crosshair:** This mods include a dynamic crosshair that changes its desgin and its visibility based on possible actions.
## ⚙️ Configuration To edit the settings of the mod: - Use Mod Menu - Use the command `/dHudConfig` to open the config screen - Edit the config file in `.minecraft/config/dynamichud.json` ## 🔧 Mod support This mod currently does not support other hud mods, this means that at worst, hud elements added by mods won't be dynamic. If you want support for a specific mod, feel free to open a Github issue. ## 📦 Modpack Feel free to add this mod in your modpacks.
